Order Custom Replacement Banners for Tripod X Display Installation

Update your Tripod X Display 24x70 with custom replacement banners designed for professional indoor and outdoor installations. Our durable vinyl replacement banners are perfect for trade shows, retail displays, and promotional events. Choose from multiple material options including weather-resistant vinyl and premium fabric materials.

Customize your replacement banner for any occasion or location with our extensive template library. Our online designer allows you to add clip art, photos, text, and backgrounds to create the perfect display banner for your Tripod X Display stand.

Three Ways to Order Custom Replacement Banners

There are three convenient ways to order your replacement banners online:

  1. Pick a Template to Customize - Add backgrounds, clipart images, text, or upload your own graphics using our online design tool
  2. Upload a Print-Ready File - Submit your own artwork following our artwork specifications
  3. Professional Design Service - Our graphic design team will create a custom replacement banner based on your uploaded artwork and specific instructions
PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Replacement Banner Material for Indoor & Outdoor Display Use

Choose from our professional-grade banner materials designed specifically for display stand applications. Each material option provides excellent print quality and durability for your Tripod X Display replacement banner.

Standard 13oz Vinyl for Display Applications

Our high-quality 13oz vinyl banner material is the standard choice for banner stand replacements. This versatile material is rated for both indoor and outdoor use, providing reliable performance in various display environments.

Premium Stay-Flat 14oz Vinyl for Professional Displays

Our 14oz vinyl banner material offers an upgrade for professional presentations requiring a premium appearance. This material produces exceptional print quality with a smooth matte finish that reduces glare and maintains a flat appearance in your display stand.

Banner Soft Fabric for Trade Show Displays

Our Banner Soft Fabric provides a sophisticated matte finish with vibrant print colors ideal for trade show and retail environments. The fabric edges are precision cut with a hot-knife to prevent fraying when rolling in and out of display stands, ensuring long-lasting professional appearance.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Replacement Banner Finishing for Tripod X Display Installation

All replacement banners are professionally finished to ensure proper fit and function with your Tripod X Display 24x70 stand. Our finishing process includes precision cutting and reinforced edges for reliable display performance.

Standard Display Finishing

Your replacement banner will be cut to exact 24" x 70" specifications with clean edges designed for easy installation in your Tripod X Display stand. All materials receive appropriate edge treatment to prevent fraying and ensure durability.

Reinforced Edges for Extended Use

For replacement banners that will be frequently changed or used in high-traffic display environments, reinforced edges provide additional durability and extended service life.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Replacement Banner Production & Turnaround Times

We offer flexible production time options to meet your display schedule requirements. Choose the production timeline that best fits your replacement banner needs and budget.

Orders approved after 5pm CST will be processed the following business day.

Available Production Options

  • 1 Day Priority: Combine Priority production with UPS overnight shipping for the fastest possible delivery of your replacement banner
  • 2 Day Express: Perfect when you need your replacement banner quickly but have an extra day for production
  • 3 Day Standard: Our most popular turnaround option - free and fast enough for most replacement banner orders
  • 5 Day Saver: Budget-friendly option when you have more time for your replacement banner project

Total delivery time equals production time plus shipping time. Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 for any questions about production scheduling.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment Options for Custom Banner Orders

All replacement banners require payment before production begins. We offer multiple convenient payment methods to process your custom banner order.

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover credit cards
  • Business checks (must be received before production begins)
  • Purchase orders (contact customer service for approval)

Your credit card will only be charged after you approve the proof for your replacement banner order. Learn more about check payment options.

Minimum order requirement: $35.00 in product value applies to all orders.

For purchase order arrangements, contact our customer service representatives at (320) 391-5300 to discuss available options.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Replacement Banner Delivery

Select your preferred shipping method during checkout. We provide 1-3 day ground shipping to 90% of the United States. View complete shipping information for detailed delivery times and restrictions.

Available Shipping Methods

  • Economy: 5-10 Business Days
  • Standard: 3-5 Business Days
  • Three Day: 3 Business Days
  • Two Day: 2 Business Days
  • Overnight: 1 Business Day

Shipping Guidelines & Restrictions

Shipping costs are calculated by package weight and destination. You will receive tracking information once your replacement banner ships. Due to UPS restrictions, banners exceeding 8 feet in both dimensions may be folded for shipping.

International Shipping: Customers must provide shipping labels and customs documentation for international shipments. We accept USPS and UPS international shipping labels only.

Economy Shipping Note: Include P.O. Box information in "Address Two" field during checkout to ensure proper delivery. Economy shipping may add 5-10 additional days depending on destination.

Contact customer service for shipping quotes outside the Continental United States or for questions about delivery options.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Display Applications for Replacement Banners

Tripod X Display replacement banners are ideal for a wide variety of professional display applications. Update your messaging for different events, seasons, or promotional campaigns with custom replacement banners.

Trade Show & Exhibition Displays

Perfect for updating your trade show presence with new product announcements, seasonal promotions, or company messaging. The portable Tripod X Display system with replacement banners provides maximum flexibility for exhibition environments.

Retail & Point-of-Sale Displays

Keep your retail messaging current with easily replaceable promotional banners. Ideal for seasonal sales, new product launches, and special promotional events in retail environments.

Corporate & Office Displays

Update reception areas, conference rooms, and corporate events with professional replacement banners. Perfect for company announcements, achievement recognition, and corporate branding displays.

Event & Conference Signage

Customize your Tripod X Display for specific events, conferences, or presentations. Replacement banners allow you to tailor messaging for different audiences and occasions using the same display hardware.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Replacement Banner Artwork Requirements for Print Production

Ensure optimal print quality for your replacement banner by following our artwork specifications and file requirements. Proper artwork preparation results in vibrant colors and sharp details on your finished display banner.

File Format Requirements

  • Preferred formats: .eps, .pdf, high-resolution .tiff, or .jpg files
  • Resolution: 300 dpi minimum for best print quality
  • Maximum file size: 60 MB for online upload
  • Color mode: CMYK preferred for accurate color reproduction

Artwork Dimensions

Your replacement banner artwork should be created at actual size (24" x 70") or proportionally scaled with sufficient resolution. Include a 0.25" bleed area around all edges for optimal finishing.

Large File Upload

For artwork files larger than 60 MB, contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 for alternative upload instructions to ensure fastest processing of your order.

Visit our complete artwork specifications page for detailed technical requirements and design guidelines.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Your Custom Replacement Banner for Tripod X Display Today

Ready to update your Tripod X Display with a custom replacement banner? Our professional-grade materials and expert printing ensure your new display banner delivers exceptional visual impact for any application.

Why Choose Banners.com for Your Replacement Banner

  • Expert Customer Service: 100% in-house support from professional graphic designers
  • Flexible Production Times: Choose 1, 2, 3, or 5-day production to meet your schedule
  • Premium Materials: High-quality vinyl and fabric options designed for display applications
  • Live Order Tracking: Monitor your replacement banner progress with our proprietary tracking system

Get started on your custom replacement banner by selecting your size, material, and design method above. Our team is ready to help you create the perfect display banner for your Tripod X Display stand.

Questions about your replacement banner order? Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 or submit a custom quote request for personalized assistance.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Replacement Banner Questions & Answers

What size replacement banner fits the Tripod X Display 24x70?

The Tripod X Display 24x70 requires a replacement banner that measures exactly 24 inches wide by 70 inches tall. This size is specifically designed to fit properly in the display stand mechanism.

How long does it take to receive my replacement banner?

Delivery time depends on your selected production time (1-5 days) plus shipping time. Most customers receive their replacement banners within 5-8 business days when choosing standard production and shipping options.

Can I use outdoor materials for my replacement banner?

Yes, our 13oz and 14oz vinyl materials are rated for both indoor and outdoor use. These materials provide weather resistance while maintaining excellent print quality for outdoor display applications.

What's the difference between vinyl and fabric replacement banners?

Vinyl banners offer durability and weather resistance, making them ideal for outdoor use and high-traffic environments. Fabric banners provide a premium matte finish with vibrant colors, perfect for trade shows and professional indoor displays.

Do you provide design services for replacement banners?

Yes, our professional graphic design team can create custom artwork for your replacement banner. Simply upload any reference materials and provide detailed instructions when placing your order.

What file formats do you accept for custom artwork?

We accept .eps, .pdf, high-resolution .tiff, and .jpg files. For best results, artwork should be 300 dpi resolution and created in CMYK color mode.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
